observations.name: get_custom_report
observations.metadata:
{"attributes":{"gen_ai.operation.name":"execute_tool","gen_ai.tool.type":"function","gen_ai.tool.call.id":"get_custom_report","gen_ai.tool.name":"get_custom_report","gen_ai.tool.description":"Calls the API to retrieve client data.

Args:
    filters: An object containing the built-in filters.
        Default values are provided if needed.
    timeDimension: Time-based dimension for data projections; specifies the granularity at which data will be grouped.
        Possible values and examples:
            - None: Indicates that the user has not provided any clear time dimension.
                This should be selected when there is no explicit instruction.
                Do NOT infer or assume a value; use None unless the user specifies otherwise.
            - Year: Represents a calendar year.
                Examples: per year, by year, year-over-year comparisons (YoY), yearly trend analysis.
            - Month: Represents a calendar month.
                Examples: per month, by month, month-over-month comparisons (MoM), monthly performance reports.
            - Week: Represents a calendar week.
                Examples: per week, by week, week-over-week comparisons (WoW), weekly campaign summaries.
            - Day: Represents a calendar day.
                Examples: per day, by day, day-over-day comparisons (DoD), daily performance tracking.
            - Hour: Represents an hour within a day.
                Examples: per hour, by hour, hourly trend analysis, intraday performance monitoring.
    dimensions: A list of dimensions that define the granularity of the report.
        Example: [os, device]
    metrics: A list of performance indicators to retrieve.
        Example: [clicks, ctr]
    attributionModel: Specifies the model used to measure sales.
        Optional.
    additionalFilters: Custom filters applied to the data.
        CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: Every dimension used in `additionalFilters` MUST be present in the `dimensions` list.
        If a filter references a dimension not included in `dimensions`, the request will be rejected.

Notes:
    - Dimensions determine the level of detail in the report.
    - Metrics represent the KPIs to monitor campaign performance.
    - Filters restrict the dataset retrieved from the API.
    - `additionalFilters` allow for extra filtering, but only on dimensions explicitly listed in `dimensions`.","api_url":"https://marketing.preprod.criteo.com/modules/analytics/dashboards/mc-custom/api/datasets/report?clientIds=22291&granularity=WEEK&dateRange=en,Europe/London,1,2025-10-01_2025-12-31&hasTotal=false&version=default&currency=EUR&dimensions=campaign,month&metrics=cost,displays,clicks,ctr,sales_pcnd,cvr","host.ip":"10.65.201.20","host.name":"kube-worker0277.kubes10.da1.preprod.crto.in","deployment.environment.name":"preprod","criteo.service.pool":"default","criteo.dc":"da1","service.version":"105537","service.instance.id":"10NDX"},"resourceAttributes":{"deployment.environment.name":"preprod","service.name":"agentic-clientinsights","service.version":"105537","service.instance.id":"10NDX"},"scope":{"name":"Experimental.Microsoft.Extensions.AI","version":"","attributes":{}}}
